# Arithmetic → Swap and Add or Subtract

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Arithmetic → Swap and Add or Subtract

Swap and Add or Subtract

Instruction Type and Width                   Instruction description
                                             Performs swap between two 32-bit sources and
                                             addition/subtraction operation. Each operation is between two
Vector Swap and Add or Subtract              sources into destination. The sources and the destination are
                                             either 32-bit or 40-bit wide determined by the vector register
                                             type.
                                             Performs swap between two 16-bit sources and
                                             addition/subtraction operation. Each operation is between two
Vector Swap and Add or Subtract Word Parts   sources into destination. The sources and the destination are
                                             either 16-bit or 20-bit wide and are packed into either 32-bit or
                                             40-bit destination determined by the vector register type.
